languages.text: {n}Вы приказываете отыскать ксеноруины, координаты которых указаны в вокс-писце, найденном у саркофага, однако авгуры не способны прорваться сквозь переплетение колоссальных корней. Если координаты и верны, узнать это удастся лишь отправив разведчиков.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Вы приказываете отыскать ксеноруины, координаты которых указаны в вокс-писце, найденном у саркофага, однако авгуры не способны прорваться сквозь переплетение колоссальных корней. Если координаты и верны, узнать это удастся лишь отправив разведчиков.{/n}

languages.text: {n}You command the search for the xenoruins located at the coordinates in the vox-scribe found near the sarcophagus, yet the augurs fail to penetrate the tangle of colossal roots. If the coordinates are indeed correct, it can only be confirmed by sending scouts.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы приказываете отыскать ксеноруины, координаты которых указаны в вокс-писце, найденном у саркофага, однако авгуры не способны прорваться сквозь переплетение колоссальных корней. Если координаты и верны, узнать это удастся лишь отправив разведчиков.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}You command the search for the xenoruins located at the coordinates in the vox-scribe found near the sarcophagus, yet the augurs fail to penetrate the tangle of colossal roots. If the coordinates are indeed correct, it can only be confirmed by sending scouts.{/n}

{n}You command the search for the xenoruins located at the coordinates in the vox-scribe found near the sarcophagus, yet the augurs fail to penetrate the tangle of colossal roots. If the coordinates are indeed correct, it can only be confirmed by sending scouts.{/n}
{n}Orbital augur scans in search of the xeno-ruins that became Seberian's grave prove fruitless. The complex tangle of colossal roots confounds the ship's machine spirits.{/n}
{n}Orbital augur scans in search of the xenos ruins that became Seberian's grave prove fruitless. The complex tangle of colossal roots confounds the machine spirits.{/n}

{n}You command the search for the xenoruins located at the coordinates in the vox-scribe found near the sarcophagus, yet the augurs fail to penetrate the tangle of colossal roots. If the coordinates are indeed correct, it can only be confirmed by sending scouts.{/n}

{n}You command the search for the xenoruins located at the coordinates in the vox-scribe found near the sarcophagus, yet the augurs fail to penetrate the tangle of colossal roots. If the coordinates are indeed correct, it can only be confirmed by sending scouts.{/n}

languages.text: {n}軌道上の探査機がシベリアの墓となった異星文明の遺跡を探したが、巨大な根の絡み合った複雑な構造に機械霊が混乱した。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Orbital augur scans in search of the xeno-ruins that became Seberian's grave prove fruitless. The complex tangle of colossal roots confounds the ship's machine spirits.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Lahit yakınlarında bulunan voks kâtibinin koordinatlarda yer alan zeno harabelerinin aranmasını emrediyorsun. Ancak alametler, devasa kök yığınını aşıp geçemiyor. Eğer koordinatlar gerçekten doğruysa bu ancak keşif erleri gönderilerek doğrulanabilir.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You command the search for the xenoruins located at the coordinates in the vox-scribe found near the sarcophagus, yet the augurs fail to penetrate the tangle of colossal roots. If the coordinates are indeed correct, it can only be confirmed by sending scouts.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Lahit yakınlarında bulunan voks kâtibinin koordinatlarda yer alan zeno harabelerinin aranmasını emrediyorsun. Ancak alametler, devasa kök yığınını aşıp geçemiyor. Eğer koordinatlar gerçekten doğruysa bu ancak keşif erleri gönderilerek doğrulanabilir.{/n}

languages.text: {n}石棺旁那台音阵通讯器里的坐标指向了一处异形遗迹，你下令找出其所在。但俄歇矩阵根本无法穿透那盘根错节的巨型根须。若坐标无误，恐怕只能派侦察兵去实地确认。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You command the search for the xenoruins located at the coordinates in the vox-scribe found near the sarcophagus, yet the augurs fail to penetrate the tangle of colossal roots. If the coordinates are indeed correct, it can only be confirmed by sending scouts.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}石棺旁那台音阵通讯器里的坐标指向了一处异形遗迹，你下令找出其所在。但俄歇矩阵根本无法穿透那盘根错节的巨型根须。若坐标无误，恐怕只能派侦察兵去实地确认。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du befehligst die Suche nach den Xenoruinen an den Koordinaten, die der Voxschreiber in der Nähe des Sarcophagus gefunden hat, aber die Auguren können das Gewirr der mächtigen Wurzeln nicht durchdringen. Sollten die Koordinaten tatsächlich korrekt sein, können dies nur Späher bestätigen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You command the search for the xenoruins located at the coordinates in the vox-scribe found near the sarcophagus, yet the augurs fail to penetrate the tangle of colossal roots. If the coordinates are indeed correct, it can only be confirmed by sending scouts.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du befehligst die Suche nach den Xenoruinen an den Koordinaten, die der Voxschreiber in der Nähe des Sarcophagus gefunden hat, aber die Auguren können das Gewirr der mächtigen Wurzeln nicht durchdringen. Sollten die Koordinaten tatsächlich korrekt sein, können dies nur Späher bestätigen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous donnez ordre de chercher les xénoruines aux coordonnées indiquées par le scribe-vox retrouvé près du sarcophage, mais l'enchevêtrement de racines colossales fait barrage aux augures. Si les coordonnées sont exactes, vous ne pourrez en avoir confirmation qu'en envoyant des éclaireurs.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You command the search for the xenoruins located at the coordinates in the vox-scribe found near the sarcophagus, yet the augurs fail to penetrate the tangle of colossal roots. If the coordinates are indeed correct, it can only be confirmed by sending scouts.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous donnez ordre de chercher les xénoruines aux coordonnées indiquées par le scribe-vox retrouvé près du sarcophage, mais l'enchevêtrement de racines colossales fait barrage aux augures. Si les coordonnées sont exactes, vous ne pourrez en avoir confirmation qu'en envoyant des éclaireurs.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Diriges la búsqueda de las xenorruinas situadas en las coordenadas del vocoescriba encontrado cerca del sarcófago, pero los augures no logran atravesar la colosal maraña de raíces. Si de verdad hay algo en esas coordenadas, necesitarás enviar exploradores a confirmarlo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You command the search for the xenoruins located at the coordinates in the vox-scribe found near the sarcophagus, yet the augurs fail to penetrate the tangle of colossal roots. If the coordinates are indeed correct, it can only be confirmed by sending scouts.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Diriges la búsqueda de las xenorruinas situadas en las coordenadas del vocoescriba encontrado cerca del sarcófago, pero los augures no logran atravesar la colosal maraña de raíces. Si de verdad hay algo en esas coordenadas, necesitarás enviar exploradores a confirmarlo.{/n}
